versions.name: First council language
versions.did: An S-expression language designed by anonymous Borda consensus on prose. Hit the Axiom-4 wall — design-by-vote isn't executable — and was reframed.

versions.name: NL→OS direct interpreter
versions.did: A Python interpreter that runs 11 natural-language intents directly as sandboxed OS operations. The frontier council broke the 119-round 10→11 plateau and reached 11/11.

versions.name: NL→terminal translator
versions.did: One-to-one English→shell: parse each intent into an ASG, EMIT the real terminal command, and the harness runs it. Same 11 intents, now produced as executable commands. Terminal level first; a Python-emitting level next.
